executions__testCaseName: Verify empty search submission behavior
executions__notes:
Bug: Empty search submission does not show validation message. 
Expected: "Please enter search term" error message.
Actual: Page refreshes with no results and no feedback to user.

Verify checkout fails with insufficient funds
executions__notes:
Bug: Generic "Transaction failed" error message shown instead of 
specific "Insufficient funds in your account" message.
Expected: Clear error message indicating insufficient funds.
Actual: User cannot determine why payment was declined.

executions__testCaseName: Verify Add to Cart button disabled for out of stock books
executions__notes:
Bug: Add to Cart button is not disabled for out-of-stock books.
Expected: Button greyed out or hidden.
Actual: Button clickable, then shows "Item unavailable" error after clicking.
